notes: The Rabbit Perch is vanity item purchased from the Zoologist for 15 GC after filling out 40% (219 entries) of the Bestiary .

The Radar has a 1/10 (10%) chance of being obtained from looting regular Chests found on or near the surface, or a 1/100 (1%) chance from Wooden and Pearlwood Crates obtained via fishing . The Radar can also be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant during a Waxing Gibbous for 2 GC 50 SC .
sourceRefName: Skeleton Merchant during a Waxing Gibbous for

conditions: The Radar has a 1/10 (10%) chance of being obtained from looting regular Chests found on or near the surface, or a 1/100 (1%) chance from Wooden and Pearlwood Crates obtained via fishing . The Radar can also be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant during a Waxing Gibbous for 2 GC 50 SC .

notes: The Rainbow Glowstick is a consumable light source . It behaves similarly to the regular Bouncy Glowstick when thrown, but cycles its light through the rainbow, as well as leaving behind a trail. It can be purchased from the Merchant during a Party for 20 CC each and can also be obtained from Chests in Celebration Mk 10 or Rainbow road worlds. In those worlds, Rainbow Glowsticks replace Glowsticks in Chests, in the same quantity. [ 1 ]

conditions: The Rainbow Gun is a Hardmode , post- Plantera magic gun that fires a curving rainbow that persists for 40 seconds or until another rainbow is fired. Enemies touching the rainbow take damage repeatedly, approximately five times per second. The Rainbow Gun is always found in the Dungeon 's Hallowed Chest , which can only be unlocked with a Hallowed Key after Plantera has been defeated.

The Red Potion is a potion which can be found in chests in drunk worlds ( 1/30 (3.33%) chance), For the Worthy worlds ( 1/10 (10%) chance), and Zenith worlds (about 13/100 (13%) chance). It can also be dropped by Jungle Mimics , which spawn in Celebration Mk 10 and Get fixed boi worlds.
Red Snappers are a type of fish which are found commonly by fishing in the Ocean in the Sky or Surface layers.

notes: The Wall Racer Car is a Hardmode , post- Plantera novelty item purchased from the Cyborg for 10 GC . Pressing the ⚒ Use / Attack button while selected in the hotbar summons a harmless car that can be controlled by the ◀ Left , and ▶ Right buttons and the ↷ Jump to jump. If the jump is pressed while the car is mid-air, the car will switch modes to instead drive on any placed walls and be controlled by the left and right button to steer, up and down button to move forward or backwards, and the jump button to jump off the wall. Pressing ⚒ Use / Attack again or switching to another item instantly destroys the car. The player appears to wield a remote control when the car is in use.

The Revolver is a pre-Hardmode gun that can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 15 GC after a Shadow Orb or Crimson Heart has been smashed. Firing the Revolver just as it comes off cooldown will gradually increase its attack speed (up to 100%) and critical strike chance (up to 20%). This effect will not be triggered if the player is autofiring the weapon.

conditions: Rich Mahogany is a type of wood harvested from Mahogany trees found naturally growing in the Jungle and Underground Jungle , or from Living Mahogany Trees , Underground Cabins in the Underground Jungle, and Jungle Shrines . Mahogany trees can naturally grow from Jungle grass above surface , or they can also be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Jungle grass above surface.

Rich Mahogany is a type of wood harvested from Mahogany trees found naturally growing in the Jungle and Underground Jungle , or from Living Mahogany Trees , Underground Cabins in the Underground Jungle, and Jungle Shrines . Mahogany trees can naturally grow from Jungle grass above surface , or they can also be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Jungle grass above surface.

The Rich Mahogany Chest is a chest found only in Underground Cabins within the Jungle and Underground Jungle biomes. Like Granite Chests and Marble Chests , Rich Mahogany Chests have exactly the same loot as Gold Chests .

The Rich Mahogany Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in Underground Cabins in the Underground Jungle , as well as in Jungle Shrines in some worlds. It drops as an item when destroyed, and can also be obtained via crafting. It is always considered a safe wall .

notes: Rocket Boots are a pre-Hardmode accessory that can be purchased from the Goblin Tinkerer for 5 GC . While equipped, they allow the player to hold ↷ Jump in midair to fly for a total of 1.17 seconds. [ 1 ] While flying, the boots emit visual flame particles that give off a large amount of light.

conditions: Rock Lobsters are a type of fishing catch which are found plentifully by fishing in the Desert biome.

The Rolling Cactus is a placeable object that behaves similarly to the Boulder . Rolling Cacti are naturally generated all throughout the Underground Desert but do not respawn once they have been activated. It is stationary when placed, and begins to move when hit by projectiles , pickaxes , or drills , or when the blocks under it are mined or hammered . Its roll direction is determined by whether its horizontal position in the world is an odd or even number, regardless of the slope of the surface it is on (unless it is blocked on one side by blocks, in which case it rolls in the other direction).

Ruby is a gem found within the Underground and Cavern layers of a world. They are obtained by breaking special blocks that have noticeable red gemstones embedded in it. They can also be extracted from Silt , Slush , or Desert Fossil by putting them in an Extractinator . Rarely, Rubies can be found in bulk in its own Gemstone Cave mini biome, or in one that contains all of the other gems as well (besides Amber ).

notes: The Ruler is a pre-Hardmode shortsword purchased from the Goblin Tinkerer for 10 SC . It swings four times in quick succession per use, with slightly varying angles with each stab.

The Safe is a portable storage item with 40 slots to store other items. The Safe, Piggy Bank , Defender's Forge (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) , and Void Vault (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) have the unique ability to be carried while they contain items. The Safe can be purchased from the Merchant for 20 GC after Skeletron has been defeated.
The Sail is a type of background wall purchased from the Pirate for 50 CC each. It is considered a valid wall for housing .

Sake is a potion that grants the Tipsy debuff when consumed, which increases many of the player's stats but lowers the player's defense for 4 minutes, twice the duration of Ale . Sake can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 5 SC .

conditions: Salmon are a type of fish which are found plentifully by fishing in a Forest in the Sky or Surface layers. They can only be caught in lakes with more than 1,000 tiles of water . [ 1 ]
The Dunerider Boots are an accessory that can be found in Sandstone Chests in the top 4/7ths of the Underground Desert , and in Oasis Crates and Mirage Crates obtained from fishing in the Oasis .

Sapphire is a gem found within the Underground and Cavern layers of a world. They are obtained by breaking special blocks that have noticeable blue gemstones embedded in it. They can also be extracted from Silt , Slush , or Desert Fossil by putting them in an Extractinator . Rarely, Sapphire can be found in bulk in its own Gemstone Cave mini biome, or in one that contains all of the other gems as well (besides Amber ).
It can be crafted, found in Oasis Crates , Mirage Crates , Sandstone Chests , or Pots in the Underground Desert .
The Scourge of the Corruptor is always found in the Dungeon 's Corruption Chest , which can only be unlocked with a Corruption Key after Plantera has been defeated.

The Seagull is a critter that spawns in the Ocean . It also has a small chance of spawning upon shaking a Palm tree or its Corrupt, Crimson, or Hallowed variant in the Ocean biome. Unlike Birds , it will not fly away when a player approaches. It will occasionally make typical seagull sounds, walk passively on land, and swim on the water's surface until they fall a certain distance or are approached while swimming, at which point they will switch to their alternative flying form. In their flying form, they will fly in a given direction for a certain amount of time before landing and switching back to their passive form. Despite their spawn conditions, they do not prioritize water whenever landing.

Seaweed is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Turtle to follow the player around. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Turtle will fly with a propeller to catch up to the player. Seaweed has a 1/50 (2%) chance of being found in Ivy Chests , located in the Underground Jungle 's Jungle Shrines or Living Mahogany Trees . On the Desktop version , Console version , and Mobile version , it also has a 1/20 (5%) chance of being obtained from Jungle Crates and Bramble Crates .

Shadewood is a type of wood harvested from Shadewood trees and Shadewood Palm trees found naturally growing in Crimson biomes. Shadewood trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Crimson grass or Crimson Jungle grass above surface , and Shadewood Palm trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Crimsand Blocks above surface.

Shadewood is a type of wood harvested from Shadewood trees and Shadewood Palm trees found naturally growing in Crimson biomes. Shadewood trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Crimson grass or Crimson Jungle grass above surface , and Shadewood Palm trees can be cultivated by placing Acorns on top of Crimsand Blocks above surface.

chanceText: 5% (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 2.5% (Old-gen console and 3DS versions) 9.75%

conditions: The Shadow Orb is a background object found deep in the chasms of the Corruption . A world generated with the Corruption features several Shadow Orbs, and destroying at least three of them (in a single world) is usually a crucial step in game advancement. This can be done using any hammer or explosives . Shadow Orbs emit purple, flickering light, similar to Demon Altars . They are the Corruption counterpart to the Crimson 's Crimson Hearts .
The Sharpening Station is a furniture item found naturally generated in Underground Cabins in the Underground Jungle . In Hardmode , it is also sold by the Merchant for 10 GC .

Unlike equipment buff items , the Sharpening Station must be placed in order to activate the buff. It can be mined with a pickaxe or drill and picked up again, even while the buff is active, which will not cancel the buff. Placement is only dependent on an adequate space of 3×2 tiles being available.

Shiverthorn is a type of herb which appears as an icy-blue flower. It grows naturally on Snow and Ice Blocks of any type. Shiverthorn can be harvested with virtually any weapon or tool , and can be planted manually using Shiverthorn Seeds in Clay Pots and Planter Boxes , or on suitable soil tiles .

Shiverthorn Seeds are a type of seed that can be obtained from harvesting Shiverthorns while they are blooming or using the Staff of Regrowth on a naturally grown Shiverthorns while they are fully grown. Shiverthorn will always bloom after a period of growth, and unlike other herbs, remains in-bloom permanently thereafter. Blooming Shiverthorn emits a glowing particle effect. Each plant drops 1–3 Shiverthorn Seeds when harvested while blooming.

The Shoe Spikes are an accessory that lets players partially "stick" to the sides of blocks, slowly sliding down them when moving against them in midair. Jumps can also be performed off the sides of blocks. By repeatedly sticking and jumping, vertical blocks can be scaled. When sliding down, the slide speed can be accelerated using the ▼ Down key. Shoe Spikes can be found in Gold Chests underground and in Rich Mahogany Chests found in the Underground Jungle .

Shoe Spikes function identically to the Climbing Claws , but are found in different locations, Climbing Claws only appearing in surface chests. When both Shoe Spikes and Climbing Claws are equipped simultaneously, the wearer remains completely "stuck" at a fixed point when moving against the sides of blocks, and may slide down with the ▼ Down key. This effect can be achieved using a single accessory if the Shoe Spikes and Climbing Claws are combined into the Tiger Climbing Gear at a Tinkerer's Workshop .

notes: The Shotgun is a Hardmode gun that can be purchased from the Arms Dealer for 25 GC . When used, it fires a spread of 4–5 bullets , consuming one piece of ammunition .

conditions: Shrimp are a type of fishing catch which are found uncommonly by fishing in the Ocean in the Sky or Surface layers.
